title: AAIB Launches Investigation into Cessna T210M Incident at Leeds East Airport

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The Air Accidents Investigation Branch (AAIB) has initiated an investigation into an incident involving a Cessna T210M (N761JU) that occurred on 11 April 2024. The aircraft reportedly lost control during its takeoff at Leeds East Airport.

Investigations of such incidents are crucial for improving aviation safety and understanding the circumstances that lead to accidents. Aviation has long been an essential connector within the UK, including in Scotland, where airports play a vital role in linking communities across the Highlands and Islands.
